top_signals.title: FirstFT: US and Iran hold high-stakes talks in Switzerland
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: Philippines warns over Chinese military activity around Scarborough Shoal, and Keir Starmer’s premiership in doubt
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US and Iran conduct tense peace talks in Switzerland
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rise as Trump threatens new strikes if Tehran does not rein in Hizbollah in Lebanon
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. to deploy powerful midrange missile system to Japan for joint drills
top_signals.summary: The deployment of the land-based Typhon system is seen as part of a more robust allied approach to countering China's growing military assertiveness in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Colombia Right-Winger Wins Preliminary Count Questioned by Petro
top_signals.summary: Conservative lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella narrowly won the preliminary vote count in Colombia’s presidential election, likely sweeping aside Gustavo Petro’s leftist movement and realigning Bogotá with the US.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
top_signals.summary: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
